summary: The diff implements all three requirements: REQ-1 (BookingForm error/success handling), REQ-2 (bilingual translation strings), and REQ-3 (backend Result type). Evidence across backend/main.mo, frontend/src/components/BookingForm.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts, and frontend/src/translations.ts covers the acceptance criteria.
